title: penstemon brevisepalus
intro: Penstemon brevisepalus, also known as the short-horned penstemon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant is native to the southwestern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Penstemon brevisepalus include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Penstemon brevisepalus can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in tincture or salve form to treat skin conditions and wounds.
